title: Strawberry VLA
subtitle: Detection & Analysis
description: YOLO11 trained detector + Qwen 2.5 VL analysis + RGB ripeness scoring. Running locally on Mac Mini M4.
results_placeholder: Results will appear here after analysis.
upload_placeholder: Upload an image and click Detect.
enter_url: Enter a YouTube URL to begin.
about_arch_text:
Two-stage pipeline optimized for real-time inference on Apple Silicon.

Stage 1 — YOLO11 processes each frame in ~10ms, outputting bounding boxes and ripeness classification.

Stage 2 — RGB color analysis provides instant ripeness percentages. Optionally, Qwen 2.5 VL performs per-crop detailed analysis (10-30s each).
model_qwen: Qwen 2.5 VL 7B — 4-bit quantized via MLX, ~4.5 GB
no_strawberries: No strawberries detected in this frame.
calib_min_images: Need at least {n} image pairs for calibration.
calib_corners_not_found: Corners not found in one or both images.
stereo_demo_banner: DEMO MODE — Synthetic stereo pair, not real 3D measurements
stereo_not_calibrated_error: Not calibrated. Run calibration first or enable demo mode.
stereo_upload_both: Upload both left and right images.
stereo_upload_or_demo: Upload a stereo pair or enable demo mode with a single image.
mono_banner: MONOCULAR MODE — 3D estimated from known strawberry size, not stereo depth
about_stereo_text: Stage 3 — Stereo vision with two calibrated cameras computes depth maps and 3D coordinates for each detected strawberry. Supports checkerboard calibration and includes a demo mode with synthetic stereo pairs. Monocular mode estimates 3D coordinates from a single camera using known strawberry dimensions.
